name: Curse of the Plagued
entries: When a creature you can see that is cursed by your Evil Eye would regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} and spend 1 Jinx Point to halve the number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} regained. Afterward, the creature can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the start of your next turn.
After you use this Misfortune, the creature is no longer cursed by your Evil Eye.
